{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Flowing Sword Enforcer
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] uses the [[Flowing Sword Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Flowing Sword Enforcer]] is a technique used on [[Netherclaw]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
